disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New-onset yellowing of the eyes and skin developing over a few days
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in the colour of your eyes or skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: This morning I noticed the whites of my eyes have gone yellow, and my skin looks a bit yellow too. It's come on over the last day or so.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dark tea/cola-coloured urine and pale acholic stools
trigger_question_examples: Have your bowel motions changed colour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My urine looks like black coffee, really dark, and my poo has gone pale, sort of putty-coloured.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent travel to an endemic region (Bali ~4 weeks ago) with consumption of local street food and tap water
trigger_question_examples: Did you eat or drink anything unusual while away?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I got back from Bali about four weeks ago. I ate a lot of street food and I did drink the tap water.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Abrupt febrile prodrome with drenching fatigue, profound anorexia, nausea and vomiting preceding the jaundice
trigger_question_examples: What were the first symptoms you noticed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about four days ago with fevers and feeling absolutely wiped out, then I completely lost my appetite and started being sick.
Yes, my whole body itches like mad, I can't stop scratching my arms.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New strong aversion to smoking in a habitual pack-a-day smoker
trigger_question_examples: Have your usual habits or tastes changed at all?
Do you smoke, and has that changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: That's the weird thing — I normally smoke a pack a day but the last few days the thought of a cigarette makes me feel sick.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Vomiting with reduced oral intake in a patient who lives alone — dehydration risk
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep fluids down?
Is there anyone at home who can help you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep vomiting and can't really keep food or drink down, and I live on my own so there's no one here.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absence of confusion, drowsiness or abnormal hand tremor at presentation (no patient-reported encephalopathy)
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt confused or unusually drowsy?
Have you noticed any shakiness or trembling of your hands?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my head feels clear enough — just exhausted. No shakes or anything like that.
